title: Mercurium
description: The unmatched optimization modpack designed for pure performance.
body:
![An image with "mercurium" text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68ba7a44ba469126f58a944e10f184930d48b9cb_0.webp)

The best performance modpack for minecraft

## Performance

Mercurium has some of the best performance mods available. They were carefully selected and configured to provide maximum fps and make your gameplay as smooth as it can be.

## Optifine parity

Mercurium gives you full optifine parity, so everything that works with optifine will probably work with mercurium too.

## Only the needed

Mercurium has only the needed mods for maximum performance. You add all other mods you want, be it quality of life or gameplay-changing mods.

## Open source

Mercurium is made with packwiz and is open source. You can [contribute](https://github.com/mc-greendale/mercurium/issues) to the pack if you want.

## FAQ

> **Q:** I have a suggestion/question\
> **A:** Post it on our [github](https://github.com/mc-greendale/mercurium/issues)

> **Q:** What mods are included\
> **A:** See the relations tab on your version of the modpack

> **Q:** Is the pack fully vanilla?\
> **A:** Yes, you don't need it on the server to be able to play, though it can improve server performance too.
